en: Gentlemen. What, uh, what seems to be the problem?
Boschial accident. Fractured tibia about five inches below the patella.
ko: 무릎 아래 약 12센티미터에서 경골 골절이 발생했습니다.

en: Dr. Harris. Yes? Concur with what, sir?
With what Dr. Ashland just said. Do you concur?
Uh, well, it was a Boschial accident. Um, the boy told us.
I think we should take an x-ray, then stitch him up and put him in a walking cast.
ko: 엑스레이를 찍고 봉합한 후 보행용 깁스를 해야 한다고 생각합니다.

en: Hold on. Dr. Cantor to cardiology. Dr. Cantor.
